blur_detection.description: The text is sharp and clearly defined with no visible blur.

contrast_assessment.description: Excellent contrast between text and background, ensuring clear text recognition.

glare_identification.description: No glare or bright spots are present that obscure the text.

water_stains.description: No water stains or discoloration are present on the document.

tears_or_folds.description: No tears, creases, or folds are visible on the document.

cut_off_detection.description: No edges of the document are cut off or excluded from the image.

missing_sections.description: All sections of the receipt/invoice are present and complete.

obstructions.description: No objects, fingers, shadows, or other elements are obstructing the document content.

classification.error_type: File location is not same as project's location
classification.reasoning: The document contains multiple fields that align with the expense schema. It includes transaction details such as the transaction amount, transaction date, payment method, and a description of the service (meal at HAI DI LAO_CTW). Although the location does not match the expected location, the document is classified as an expense due to the presence of necessary fields.

schema_field_analysis.expense_identification_reasoning: The document contains 6 out of 8 required fields, including transaction amount, transaction date, payment method, and item description, confirming it as an expense document.

issues.description: Personal Meal during Business Trips generally not exceeding 150 RMB/day/person is tax exempt. Set rates: 1st tier cities (Beijing, Shanghai, Guangzhou, Shenzhen) 200 yuan per day (80 yuan per meal lunch/dinner), new 1st tier and 2nd tier cities 150 yuan per day (60 yuan per meal), 3rd tier cities 100 yuan per day (40 yuan per meal). Meals exceeding limit treated as entertaining customers or reimbursed after withholding personal income tax
issues.recommendation: Meals exceeding the limit of 150 RMB/day/person will be treated as entertaining customers or reimbursed after withholding personal income tax
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Personal Meal during Business Trips generally not exceeding 150 RMB/day/person is tax exempt. Set rates: 1st tier cities (Beijing, Shanghai, Guangzhou, Shenzhen) 200 yuan per day (80 yuan per meal lunch/dinner), new 1st tier and 2nd tier cities 150 yuan per day (60 yuan per meal), 3rd tier cities 100 yuan per day (40 yuan per meal). Meals exceeding limit treated as entertaining customers or reimbursed after withholding personal income tax

issues.description: Original invoice and deduction sheet must be sent to Local Employer's Dalian Branch: Name: Sylvia Jiang, Office Address: 大连市高新园区高新街9号晟辉科技大厦703室, Tel.: +86 17615158127 or 0411-81760355 dial 808. Use S.F. Express paid by shipper and collect express fee invoice for reimbursement

issues.description: Business expenses must be submitted within 4 months from date of issuance. Invoices cannot be used across years
issues.recommendation: Please ensure that business expenses are submitted within 4 months from the date of issuance. Invoices cannot be used across years
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Business expenses must be submitted within 4 months from date of issuance. Invoices cannot be used across years

validation_result.compliance_summary: The receipt has multiple compliance issues including missing mandatory fields such as supplier name, transaction date, total amount, item description, supplier address, supplier VAT number, and supplier phone number. Additionally, the meal expense exceeds the tax-exempt limit and requires gross-up. Follow-up actions are required to submit the original invoice and deduction sheet to the local employer's Dalian branch and ensure expenses are submitted within 4 months from the date of issuance.
